title: stipa glareosa subsp. pubescens
intro: Stipa glareosa subsp. pubescens, also known as silky bent, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to certain regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm and soothe the digestive system. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can provide relief from conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome and menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of silky bent include infusions and teas, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation.
